mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate at 3.64% combined with CPI at 326.588 (index level) signals persistent inflation above target. The Fed maintains restrictive policy stance, keeping real rates elevated. This sustains upward pressure on 10-year Treasury yields as market prices in continued rate-hold expectations and inflation risk premium.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with sticky inflation
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days despite FEDFUNDS remaining above 3.5% and CPIAUCSL showing no month-over-month decline, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 4.3% combined with payroll employment at 158,627 thousand indicates tight labor market. Sustained tight labor conditions signal persistent wage pressure and inflation expectations, forcing the Fed to maintain higher rates longer, which pushes 10-year Treasury yields upward as term premium expands.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains below 4.5% AND PAYEMS shows month-over-month growth
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls over 20 trading days when both UNRATE < 4.5% and PAYEMS growth is positive, or the joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales (RSAFS) at 734,967 million and housing starts (HOUST) at 1,246 thousand indicate robust aggregate demand. Strong demand growth raises inflation expectations and signals the Fed will keep rates elevated, pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher as the market reprices growth and inflation risk.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS month-over-month growth > 0.5% OR HOUST > 1,200 thousand
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days despite both RSAFS and HOUST showing strength, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 102.325 (index 2017=100) reflects moderate supply-side capacity utilization. If INDPRO declines month-over-month, it signals weakening supply capacity and potential stagflation risk, causing the market to demand higher term premium on 10-year Treasuries as growth expectations fall but inflation persists.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises over 60 trading days following a month-over-month INDPRO decline > 0.3%, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP (GDPC1) at 24,026.834 billion chained 2017 dollars (last observation 7 months prior) combined with current retail sales momentum indicates sustained economic growth. Persistent growth above trend raises Fed rate-hold expectations and inflation risk premium, pushing 10-year Treasury yields upward over the next 5 trading days as market reprices near-term rate path.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 5 trading days despite GDPC1 growth trajectory and positive RSAFS momentum, or Rank IC < 0.06 over any 6-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate at 3.64% is above the estimated neutral rate. If FEDFUNDS rises above 4.0% in the next observation, it signals further monetary tightening. This tightening shock compresses equity valuations and raises discount rates, causing 10-year Treasury yields to spike upward as the market reprices the terminal rate higher.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 20 trading days following a FEDFUNDS rise above 4.0%, or the threshold-triggered signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 4.3% combined with payroll employment at 158,627 thousand and industrial production at 102.325 creates a three-way interaction: tight labor markets with strong production signal full-capacity economy. This regime produces persistent inflation, forcing the Fed to maintain restrictive policy, which elevates 10-year Treasury yields through both rate expectations and term premium channels.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines over 60 trading days when all three conditions (UNRATE < 4.5%, PAYEMS > 158,000, INDPRO > 102.0) are simultaneously met, or the three-way interaction produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) at 1,246 thousand indicate robust residential investment demand. If HOUST declines below 1,100 thousand in the next observation, it signals demand destruction and recession risk. This triggers a flight-to-quality response where investors sell equities and buy long-duration Treasuries, causing 10-year Treasury yields to fall sharply over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises over 5 trading days following a HOUST decline below 1,100 thousand, or the threshold-triggered signal produces Rank IC < 0.05 over any 12-month rolling window.
